prompt: Build a screen flow for a login/signup experience: Landing Page → Login Form → Dashboard (on success) OR Landing Page → Sign Up Form → Email Verification → Dashboard. Show both paths branching from the landing page. Include an error path from Login Form to 'Invalid Credentials' error screen that loops back.
expected_output: A standalone HTML file showing branching screen flows with two paths from the landing page. Login and signup forms should show form-type wireframe content. The error screen should be visually distinct (red accent). Dashboard should show dashboard-type content. Green connectors with action labels.
